title: AI Agent
provider_subtitle: Manage AI model providers and connections
provider_test_hint: The test sends a minimal request to verify the configuration
provider_count_hint: The default model is used for new conversations
model_no_models_desc: Add your first model to start using the AI Agent
skills_subtitle: Manage agent skill packages (SKILL.md prompts, scripts, references)
skills_empty_desc: Upload a ZIP or import your first skill from a URL
skills_uninstall_confirm: Are you sure to uninstall Skill "{{name}}"?
skills_click_to_view_code: Click tool name to view code
skills_no_updates: All skills are up to date
chat_no_model: No model configured. Please add one in Model Service first.
chat_welcome_hint: Ask me anything about your scripts
chat_welcome_start: Create a conversation to get started
chat_background_enabled_tip: Background mode ON — conversation keeps running after closing the page, click to disable
chat_background_disabled_tip: Background mode OFF — conversation stops when the page is closed, click to enable
permission_title: The script is requesting to use Agent conversation
permission_describe: This script requests Agent conversation access, which will consume API tokens. Only grant access to trusted scripts.
opfs_subtitle: Origin Private File System · Agent private storage
opfs_empty_desc: No files in this directory yet
dom_permission_title: The script is requesting DOM operation access
dom_permission_describe: This script requests the ability to read and manipulate web page DOM (click, fill forms, navigate, screenshot, etc.). Only grant access to trusted scripts.
mcp_subtitle: Connect MCP servers to extend agent tools, resources and prompts
mcp_no_servers_desc: Add your first MCP server to connect external tools and data
tasks_subtitle: Run agent tasks automatically on a cron schedule
tasks_notify_desc: Send a browser notification when the task completes
tasks_no_tasks_desc: Create your first scheduled task to run the agent automatically
tasks_clear_runs_confirm: Are you sure to clear the run history?
tasks_event_hint: When triggered, the script that created this task will be notified
settings_subtitle: Model, search and general preferences · changes apply instantly
summary_model_desc: Model for summarization, falls back to default if not set
chat_max_iterations_desc: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls the Agent can make in one conversation. Increasing this may raise the token cost of a single task — keep an eye on your balance.
search_engine_desc: The retrieval source used by the web_search tool.
search_google_api_key_desc: Used to call the Custom Search JSON API.
search_google_cse_id_desc: The cx parameter of the Programmable Search Engine.
search_engine_tip_bing: Default search engine with broad global coverage, no extra configuration needed.
search_engine_tip_duckduckgo: Privacy-focused search engine, no API key required.
search_engine_tip_baidu: Optimized for Chinese content, better results for Chinese queries.
search_engine_tip_google: High-quality search results, requires a Google API Key and Custom Search Engine ID.
